libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native test execution, ensure the generated test build applies runtime system properties for 5.0.1: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Do not keep this guarded only for 5.0.0. Meaningful tests can use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer with WebClient for GET/POST JSON, forms, multipart upload, streaming, caching, redirects, cookies, and sessions; no external service is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: If tests deliberately cover OAuth2WebClient, io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 is an optional dependency and may need to be added, but it is not required for meaningful core web-client coverage.
If the runtime properties are omitted for the JDK 25 native-image run, Netty unsafe/reflection paths may fail even when JVM tests pass.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 is usable with the normal local Vert.x WebClient/HttpServer scaffold and needs no extra Maven dependency or Docker service, but its Vert.x 5.0.1 dependency stack uses Netty 4.2.2.Final and native runs on JDK 25 need the existing Netty/Unsafe runtime system properties to apply to 5.0.1 as well.
